profile.name: Lattice Semiconductor Corporation
profile.description: Lattice Semiconductor Corporation develops and sells programmable logic semiconductor products, including field-programmable gate arrays (FPGAs), that enable custom-configurable logic arrays for diverse applications. The company specializes in low-power FPGAs such as Lattice Nexus, Lattice Nexus 2, Lattice Avant platforms, and general-purpose options like Avant-G, Avant-E, Avant-X, Certus, and ECP, alongside specialized FPGAs including Mach, iCE, and CrossLink for security and video connectivity. It offers design software like Lattice Radiant for predictable design convergence, Lattice Propel for embedded processor designs, and application-specific solutions such as Lattice Automate for industrial automation and robotics, mVision for low-power embedded vision, ORAN for communications security and synchronization, sensAI for edge AI, Sentry for hardware security, and Drive for automotive systems. Additionally, Lattice provides Glance edge AI software for computer vision in client computing, industrial, and automotive sectors, plus video connectivity products, standard IP licensing, and related services. Serving communications, computing, industrial, automotive, and consumer markets, Lattice Semiconductor Corporation, founded in 1983 and headquartered in Hillsboro, Oregon, plays a key role in enabling efficient, adaptable solutions for AI acceleration, machine learning, video processing, and edge computing.
